subcodes.first_line: This is a Book We have sent down unto him who hath turned towards Us and attained unto the days of his Lord, and who hath witnessed tribulation and adversity in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه لمن اقبل و فاز بایام ربه و شهد الباساء و الضرآء فی سبیل الله
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Word of God and human limitations, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
